--- a/api/views.py
+++ b/api/views.py
@@ -5,8 +5,6 @@
 def get_profile(request):
     user_id = request.GET.get('user_id')
-    if user_id is None:
-        return HttpResponse(status=400)
     user = User.objects.get(id=user_id)

gold_annotations.issue: Removed None check — User.objects.get(id=None) raises unhandled exception.
